meaning: n."黄饼"(核反应燃料重铀酸铵或重铀酸钠的俗称)
examples: It has converted yellowcake into uranium hexafluoride gas.
The international inspection team ensured that no yellowcake was missing.
I was very curious about that, because I could not see why Iraq should at this stage, in 2002, want to import yellowcake.
When uranium comes out of the ground it is milled into a powder called yellowcake.
The uranium is isolated, concentrated and refined into uranium oxide, also known as yellowcake.
